title: verbascum × maeandriforme
intro: Verbascum × maeandriforme, also known as the Maeandr's Mullein or Hybrid Mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum lychnitis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe inflammation and irritation in the respiratory tract. The health benefits of Verbascum × maeandriforme include its potential to alleviate coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × maeandriforme can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues.
